name: corex-design-studio
description: AI-powered design platform like Canva with multi-agent collaboration

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.test:watch: concurrently "npm run test:watch -w backend" "npm run test:watch -w frontend"
